title: Old Recipes
description: Minecraft's old and removed recipes reimplemented!
body:
*Another* mod... bringing back Minecraft's [old](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Crafting#Changed_recipes) or [removed](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Crafting#Removed_recipes) recipes!

---
Including a "normal" and "friendly" version:

"Normal" versions don't care about Minecraft's gameplay and _could_ make items useless or unobtainable through some recipes. No extra recipes have been added apart from the listed ones on the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/).

"Friendly" versions or "_friendlier_" versions alter or remove recipes to make sure the base experience isn't dramatically changed (i.e. Netherite crafting recipes requiring a [Smithing Template](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Smithing_Template)) and makes sure all items are obtainable.
###### (not including Bedrock Edition's recipes. #JavaIsBetter)
